zh.lifeSummary: 當Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP於1334年出生在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick21歲，母親Katherine Mortimer21歲。她於1359年之前與Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1386年4月6日在英國斯塔福爾史東享年52歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾史東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP于1334年出生在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick21岁，母亲Katherine Mortimer21岁。她于1359年之前与Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1386年4月6日在英国斯塔福爾史東享年52岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾史東。

nameMeanings.name: BEAUCHAMP
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP was born in 1334, in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick, was 21 and her mother, Katherine Mortimer, was 21. She married Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford before 1359, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 6 April 1386, in Stone, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Stone, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP est née en 1334, à Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Katherine Mortimer, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford avant 1359, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 avril 1386, à Stone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Stone, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP 1334 in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick 21 und ihre Mutter Katherine Mortimer 21. Sie hat vor 1359 in England Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. April 1386 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Stone, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Stone, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP è nata il nel 1334 nel Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Katherine Mortimer, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford prima del 1359, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 aprile 1386, nel Stone, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Stone, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMPが1334年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックワーウィック カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwickは21歳，母Katherine Mortimerは21歳であった。1359年以前にイギリスでHugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1386年4月6日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアストーンで52歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP(이)가 1334년 영국 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Mortimer(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1359년 이전 영국에서 Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 4월 6일 영국 스태퍼드실르 스톤에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP nasceu em 1334, em Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Mortimer, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford antes 1359, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de abril de 1386, em Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP родилась в 1334 г. в местности варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine Mortimer, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford перед 1359 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 6 апреля 1386 г. в местности стоун, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности стоун, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP nació en 1334, en Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Katherine Mortimer, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford antes de 1359, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 6 de abril de 1386, en Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
